author: anon-a7c6025f
content: QA found 34 issues: 4 CRITICAL, 9 HIGH, 11 MEDIUM, 10 LOW. Fixing all 24 CRITICAL+HIGH+MEDIUM issues now. Root causes: (1) stride views added without updating data() consumers, (2) polynomial math missing edge case guards, (3) AdamW state corruption on partial failure, (4) Arc mutation unsoundness.
